title: MCC 15th Party Music Pack
description: This pack replaces 5 music disc from vanilla,they were modified to the music of MCC event
body:
## Introduction Replace 5 disc music and texture
They now put in the record machine to play music from the MCC event
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ceec62985d2293d77f6acdb8121b4a6ca8d9a1.png) ## Replaced Musics 13 -> Meltdown
cat -> Grid Runnners
blocks -> Sands of time
11 -> Ace Race
5 -> Main Lobby
## Notice 1.Since I couldn't change the name of the album that was played
I changed item name of the Music Disc
2.Only support Chinese and English item name
Other language will display "Music Disc"(Original music disc name) ## Thanks [https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Hm42137no](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Hm42137no)
The author of this video created a resource pack for Bedrock Edition
I moved it to Java Edition :)
